original_statement: "England are the third likeliest of any team to top their group at this World Cup. They finished top of Group L in 67.5% of the 25,000 Opta supercomputer projections. Croatia (76.9%) also have a strong chance of reaching the knockout phase from this group."
statement_topic: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group L group winner and qualification
statement_context: Excerpt from Opta supercomputer Group L preview published by The Analyst on 2026-06-04. Author Andrew Beasley using 25,000 simulations.
resolution_criteria: England finishes first in Group L in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group stage standings published after all group matches conclude on or before 2026-06-27.
source_text_snippet: England are the third likeliest of any team to top their group at this World Cup. They finished top of Group L in 67.5% of the 25,000 Opta supercomputer projections.
